mapper.sql:
SELECT A.REQ_SEQ ,A.VOC_SEQ ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', B.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM ,B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NAME ,A.VOC_AGNT_CD ,FN_GET_ORGNM(A.VOC_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_NAME ,FN_GET_ORGNM(A.VOC_AGNT_CD) || '/' || A.VOC_AGNT_CD AS VOC_AGNT_CD_NAME ,FN_GET_CODENM('ACEN0006', A.VOC_SUB_CTG_CD) AS VOC_SUB_CTG_CD_NAME ,TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS VOC_DTTM ,A.STATUS ,FN_GET_CODENM('ACEN0005', A.STATUS) AS STATUS_NAME ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.VOC_RCP_ID) AS VOC_RCP_NAME ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DUE_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DT ,TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM ,DECODE(A.RVISN_ID, 'ACEN', A.RVISN_ID, FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID)) AS RVISN_NAME FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_REQ@DL_MCP A ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM
AND A.REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{srchStrtDt},'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{srchEndDt},'YYYYMMDD') + 1
AND A.STATUS IN ('05', '06', '07') AND A.RVISN_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{compStrtDt},'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{compEndDt},'YYYYMMDD') + 1
AND A.VOC_AGNT_CD = #{cntpntShopId}
AND A.STATUS != '00'
AND A.STATUS = #{status}
AND (B.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchName} OR B.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchName}))
AND B.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchName}
AND C.LST_RATE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchName} || '%'
AND UPPER(B.SUB_LINK_NAME) LIKE UPPER(#{searchName}) || '%'
ORDER BY A.REQ_SEQ DESC
mapper.select:
/*AcenVocMapper.getAcenVocInfo*/ SELECT REQ_SEQ AS reqSeq ,VOC_SEQ AS vocSeq ,CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum ,VOC_AGNT_CD AS vocAgntCd ,STATUS AS status ,VOC_SUB_CTG_CD AS vocSubCtgCd ,VOC_CONTENT AS vocContent ,DUE_DT AS dueDt ,ANS_CONTENT AS ansContent ,CALL_CONTENT AS callContent ,TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS rvisnDttm ,RVISN_ID AS rvisnId FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}
AND VOC_AGNT_CD = #{cntpntShopId}
mapper.insert: /*AcenVocMapper.insertAcenVocHist*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_ACEN_VOC_HIST@DL_MCP( REQ_SEQ ,SEQ ,VOC_AGNT_CD ,STATUS ,DUE_DT ,VOC_SUB_CTG_CD ,VOC_CONTENT ,ANS_CONTENT ,CALL_CONTENT ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT REQ_SEQ ,NVL((SELECT MAX(SEQ) + 1 FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_HIST@DL_MCP WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}), 1) ,VOC_AGNT_CD ,STATUS ,DUE_DT ,VOC_SUB_CTG_CD ,VOC_CONTENT ,ANS_CONTENT ,CALL_CONTENT ,RVISN_ID ,SYSDATE FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}
